title: "Cognitive Surrender" — Friction in Human Labor and Education

title: Boo It And Use It: What Gen Z Gets Right About AI
snippet: I have been thinking about those boos at graduation. And the paradox: no demographic uses AI more than Gen Z. It's their productivity tool, their brainstorming partner, their 2 a.m. confessor. The booers and the power users are the same people. Meanwhile, higher education is busy updating the honor code... our whole notion of assessment needs reconsideration and innovation.
